lament: ^Captain Aldric: Who... who walks here? Living souls. I can feel the warmth of you.
^Captain Aldric: I am — was — Captain Aldric. I led the Order's last expedition into the Warrens.
^Captain Aldric: The shadow got into me. Slowly. I fought it... but not long enough.
^Captain Aldric: My body still wanders these tunnels. Corrupted. Killing. I can feel it happening from here but I cannot stop it.
^Captain Aldric: Please. Destroy what I have become. In my chamber — the silver-locked room to the west — that thing awaits.
^Captain Aldric: If you do this, I will give you the Second Seal Fragment. I carried it when I fell.
pre_fight: ^Captain Aldric: You have found my chamber. What you face is not me — not anymore.
^Captain Aldric: Fight without mercy. If you hesitate, it will kill you.
at_peace: ^Captain Aldric: It is... quiet. For the first time in years, it is quiet.
^Captain Aldric: You found my badge too. Good. Give it to Voss, if he still walks up there.
^Captain Aldric: The Second Seal Fragment is yours. You earned it.
^Captain Aldric: The Hollow King is strong. Use all three Fragments — reinforce the seals before you fight.
^Captain Aldric: Or... if you find the three Void Runes in the Sanctum, you can negotiate. I never tried that path. I was not brave enough.
